summary: Iteration 9 testing complete. All requested features verified: Mail Settings API (GET/POST /api/mail/settings, POST /api/mail/test) working with file fallback, Activity Logs API (GET /api/activity-logs) returning correct field names (actor_email, entity, created_at). Frontend pages AdminLogs.jsx and AdminMailSettings.jsx loading correctly with proper data display.

Activity logs correctly return actor_email, entity, created_at fields matching AdminLogs.jsx expectations
SMTP password is properly masked as '********' when returned from GET /api/mail/settings
